pages.title: Industrial flaying
pages.text: Throw leather through the sewing needle's logic to unwrap eight $(rev)Skin$(warn) sheets — identical conversion rate to the historic port.

pages.title: Why stacks matter
pages.text: Skin wraps entire limb bundles before Soul Hearts finalize an egg — shortages stall mid-recipe like forgetting Botania runes mid-apothecary craft.
